productStatusRationale.registration: Local bybit.kz registration confirmed; residency/citizenship scope partially resolved (cf-kz-bybit-001).
productStatusRationale.kyc: Mandatory KYC confirmed; accepted-document scope differs (individual vs business).
productStatusRationale.spot: Spot confirmed on local bybit.kz materials.
productStatusRationale.derivatives: Perps/expiry/options confirmed; user-level KYC/region conditions apply.
productStatusRationale.margin: Documented with risk-tier limits (cross/portfolio; not isolated for spot margin).
productStatusRationale.p2p: Available but KYC-required — more conservative than ECF AVAILABLE (identity-verification limit).
productStatusRationale.kzt_p2p: Dedicated KZT P2P market page confirmed.
productStatusRationale.direct_kzt_deposit: KZT bank transfer supported but identity-bound (IIN/BIN match, no third-party) — conservative vs ECF AVAILABLE.
productStatusRationale.direct_kzt_withdrawal: KZT bank transfer/IBAN supported but identity-bound — conservative vs ECF AVAILABLE.
productStatusRationale.bank_card_purchase: bybit.kz vs bybit.com routing unresolved (cf-kz-bybit-002) — CONFLICTING.
productStatusRationale.bybit_card: Local AIFC card docs exist with supported-country/eligibility limits.
productStatusRationale.referral: Referral-code entry exists but global-code compatibility UNVERIFIED (clm-kz-bybit-offer-001).
productStatusRationale.promotions: Local promo programs exist but campaign-specific eligibility; amounts kept separate; no CTA/promo.

limitations: bybit.kz is the confirmed local route for core trading and KZT rails, but some bybit.com / card / referral routing remains partially resolved
Kazakhstan promotional eligibility is narrower than platform availability
local promotional amounts exist, but they must not be confused with a globally advertised maximum
